title: sorghum serrulatum
intro: Sorghum serrulatum, also known as devil's claw, is a plant species native to Africa and Asia, known for its unique claw-shaped fruit. The medicinal properties of Sorghum serrulatum are attributed to its high content of iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from arthritis, muscle and joint pain, as well as digestive issues. Sorghum serrulatum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate its listed health benefits.
